title: ElytraManager
description: Completely manage your player's Elytra and even add limited flight time or cool flying effects.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd5abb440ae7c932cd91b1872d54030cc552dae2.png)

![top border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9ee2350f2b2fb50513f9aefd6a293db9884dcca.png)
![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c7a8771128b92c80b2f85bb0b815f84f3f1ed82.png)

- Easily disable the ability for players to equip an Elytra.
- Restrict or completely disable Elytra flight on your server.
- Set individual flight time limits for players to ensure balanced gameplay.
- Enable automatic recovery of flight time or customize how players regain flight.
- Choose between a unique flight time display or show the exact remaining time for precision.
- Prevent fall damage when players run out of flight time, keeping them safe.
- Fully customize Elytra flight, firework boosting, and riptide boosting across different worlds.
- Disable firework boosting or set a customizable cooldown to balance Elytra flight.
- Disable riptide boosting or apply a cooldown to prevent abuse.
- Reward players with awesome Elytra flight effects, perfect for in-game purchases or special achievements.

#### PlaceholderAPI is optional/supported. The only placeholder is "%elytramanager_flight_time%" which displays a player's flight time.

![installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4a7930b873b56961403814f9606e7a7cb41a3da.png)

**(Java 21+ Required)**
Simply download the .jar and place it within your plugins folder, no dependecies required.


### Commands
- /elytramanager - If left blank it opens a GUI that enable/disables settings)​
- /elytrainventory (aliases: /einv, /einventory) - allows a player to view their flying effects/equip them​
- /elytratoggle (aliases: /etoggle) - lets a player toggle between flight time displays

### Permissions
- elytramanager.alerts - notifies you when a new update is available
- elytramanager.command.admin - grants access to /elytramanager
- elytramanager.command.elytrainventory - grants access to /elytrainventory
- elytramanager.command.elytratoggle - grants access to /elytratoggle
- elytramanager.alerts.update - alerts you when an update is out
- elytramanager.bypass.equip - grants access to equip Elytras
- elytramanager.bypass.flight - grants access to fly Elytras
- elytramanager.bypass.flight-time - bypasses the flight time restriction if enabled
- elytramanager.bypass.flight-recovery - grants a player automatic flight recovery time
- elytramanager.bypass.fall-damage - prevents fall damage if you fall from flight time
- elytramanager.bypass.firework - grants permission to firework boost with an Elytra
- elytramanager.bypass.firework-cooldown - bypasses firework boosting cooldown
- elytramanager.bypass.trident- grants permission to riptide boost with an Elytra
- elytramanager.bypass.trident-cooldown - bypasses riptide boosting cooldown


![support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03aec97720f59a0e47a313cdc2d580c608f44abd.png)

Need additional help with the plugin? Check out the Documentation tab for more information that might help, otherwise reach out to me over at discord - especially if you have any suggestions or issues (bugs)!

![bottom border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35a10cd36c6d7d34d21a389bd712ac64b75356be.png)
